name: blackraptor-dev-team
description: A governed AI development team: a process orchestrator, a principal architect, engineers, and blocking-gate reviewers (security, privacy, compliance, red-team, and the completion-auditor verification gate). Ships shared skills — excellence-pass, gate-verdict-format, enforcement-liveness, change-record, stride-review, owasp-llm-checklist, expand-contract-migration. Auto-pulls the `blackraptor-bridge` plugin, which adds the shared `product-manager` and `evidence-auditor` agents + the `research-integrity` skill.
